sourcesContent:
import React, { useContext } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { AuthContext } from '../context/AuthContext'; const actionCards = [ { title: 'Manage Slots', description: 'Create and organize your available time slots.', icon: 'Schedule', to: '/slots', }, { title: 'Chat', description: 'Respond to student queries in real time.', icon: 'Messages', to: '/chat', }, { title: 'Materials', description: 'Upload and maintain learning resources.', icon: 'Library', to: '/materials', }, { title: 'Bookings', description: 'Review upcoming and confirmed student sessions.', icon: 'Bookings', to: '/slots?view=booked', }, ]; const StaffDashboard = () => { const { user } = useContext(AuthContext); return (

Welcome, {user?.name}

Manage schedules, student communication, and study resources from one place.

{actionCards.map((card) => (
{card.icon}
{card.title}

{card.description}

))}
Your Profile

Name: {user?.name}

Email: {user?.email}

Subject: {user?.subject || 'Not specified'}

Role: Staff

Quick Tips
  • Keep slot availability updated to reduce scheduling conflicts.
  • Upload current materials so students can prepare before sessions.
  • Respond to messages promptly to maintain continuity.
  • Review bookings regularly and confirm upcoming sessions early.
); }; export default StaffDashboard;
